title: AI adoption rises globally but gap widens -- Microsoft
description: GLOBAL use of artificial intelligence continued to expand in 2025, but uneven adoption between advanced and developing economies is widening a digital divide, according to a new report and statements from Microsoft Philippines.
content:

title: Musk asks SpaceX IPO banks to buy Grok AI subscriptions
description: ELON Musk is requiring banks and other advisers working on SpaceX’s planned initial public offering (IPO) to buy subscriptions to Grok, his artificial intelligence (AI) chatbot, The New York Times reported on Friday, citing people familiar with the matter.

title: Freelancers should stop writing prompts and start building systems
description: RISING oil prices are once again forcing companies to rethink how they operate. Many are returning to remote work arrangements to manage costs. At the same time, freelancers are feeling a different kind of pressure. Some clients are reducing hours, scaling back engagements, or turning to artificial intelligence tools to do more with fewer people.

title: Artificial Intelligence: Revolutionizing Every Aspect of Life - Gujarat High Court Bans AI in Judicial Decision-Making
description: Artificial Intelligence (AI) is rapidly redefining the way we live, work, and interact. No longer confined to the realm of science fiction, AI is now a driving force behind innovations across all sectors— from healthcare and finance to entertainment and manufacturing. Its impact is far-reaching, transforming industries, reshaping economies, and influencing the way we navigate daily life.

title: How AI Tools Have Helped Reduce the Burden of Teachers
description: The education sector has undergone a significant transformation in recent years, driven largely by the adoption of artificial intelligence (AI).
